component.name: Swatchbook
Swatchbook
component.summary: Catálogo de estilos basado en Markdown

description.p: Swatchbook lets you write colour palettes, typography specs, and design tokens in plain Markdown and renders them as an interactive, shareable swatch canvas — right inside a native GNOME window.
Type a colour name and hex value in the editor; the canvas updates live. Save your binder as a plain .md file you can open in any editor or share with your team.

ul.li: Live Markdown-to-swatch preview with 150 ms debounce
Supports #rrggbb, #rgb, rgb(), and CSS named colours
Sections map to headed groups of swatches
Open, save, and save-as with native file dialogs
Auto-save every 30 seconds with crash recovery
Dark mode — follows the system colour scheme automatically
Responsive layout — collapses to single-column on narrow displays

description.p: Swatchbook te permite escribir paletas de colores, especificaciones tipográficas y tokens de diseño en Markdown simple, y los renderiza como un lienzo interactivo de muestras dentro de una ventana nativa de GNOME.
All phases completed: live Markdown parsing, canvas renderer, file I/O, auto-save, Spanish translation, and release automation.
Initial release of the Markdown style binder.
